title: Umapyoi Delight
description: An addon of Umapyoi mod and Farmer's Delight
body:
![Umapyoi Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0c268c22ab6019fc85d6c7d0cc51a5256f5f040.png) ### **About** Umapyoi Delight is a small add-on for [Umapyoi](https://modrinth.com/mod/umapyoi) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight). Require both mods.
**This mod is working in progress. Remember there might be major changes.** ### **Features** * Add 3 new crops (Garlic, Chili pepper, Strawberry)  * Add rare crops (Carrot, Garlic, Potato, Chili pepper, Strawberry) * Add new foods related *Umamusume: Pretty Derby*
